name: nanofleet-news
description: Daily news digest — generates a PDF newspaper from RSS feeds and delivers it to your channel every morning
author: NanoFleet
toolsDoc:
## nanofleet-news — Daily News Digest

This plugin generates a PDF newspaper from RSS feeds every morning and delivers it to the configured channel.

### generate_digest
Manually trigger the generation and delivery of the news digest. Use this when the user asks to generate the journal now.

### list_digests
List previously generated digests (id, date, filename).
